guide_title: National Donut Day: Free Donut Stops
manual_intro: National Donut Day lands on Friday 5 June 2026. These are verified free-donut stops with a real outlet mapped for this city or nearby metro area. place_description: Free Hot Cinnamon Donut on Friday 5 June 2026 at participating Donut King stores, while stocks last. Source: Donut King National Donut Day terms.
